exchanges.prompt: Design an AWS serverless API with API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, and CloudWatch monitoring

response.content:
graph TD
    A[Rounded Rectangle: Start] -->|Initiate Request| B(API Gateway)
    B -->|Route Request| C(Lambda Function)
    C -->|Read/Write Data| D(DynamoDB)
    C -->|Store Files| E(S3)
    C -->|Log Events| F(CloudWatch)
    F -->|Trigger Alert| G(CloudWatch Alarm)
    G -->|Send Notification| H(SNS)
    C -->|Return Response| B
    B -->|Return Response| A
    A -->|End| I[Rounded Rectangle: End]
